data.text/markdown:
Coordination networks (CIB triage)

Detect account clusters acting in concert across behavioural channels, validated against null models and corroborated across layers. Sampling caveat: Capture is a sample, not a census: absence of a co-action is not evidence of absence. Recall is bounded; precision is not affected. Coordination alone is not malicious - the scorecard ranks clusters for human review using Phase 1 authenticity + Phase 2 narrative signals.

data.text/html:
Data coverage

Wave B channels (co-hashtag / co-URL / co-mention) unlock as the share of posts carrying structured fields grows.
